chunks.title: Genealogy of Ezra
chunks.reason: Lists the priestly lineage from Seraiah to Aaron.

chunks.title: Ezra's Journey and Purpose
chunks.reason: Describes Ezra's departure from Babylon, arrival in Jerusalem, and his heart to study the law.

chunks.title: Letter of Artaxerxes
chunks.reason: Contains the full royal decree granting authority, resources, and judicial power to Ezra.

chunks.title: Ezra's Thanksgiving
chunks.reason: Ezra blesses God for the king's favor and concludes the narrative of his gathering.
